violations.text: The establishment is lacking a three compartment sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize equipment. Establishment is not permitted to sell popcorn at this time. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
The establishment is lacking a three compartment sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize equipment. Establishment is not permitted to sell popcorn at this time. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
The establishment is lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. An employee illness policy was given to the person in charge during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023

The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Written procedures were given to the person in charge during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023
Establishment did not have sanitizer during time of inspection. Equipment must be sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
Establishment does not have a 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
